Comment.value: Called from Clone List CL
Called from Clone Tag
Called from Clone PageItem SRV
Called from Clone IO SRV

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix ) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_list_id" ; $old_list_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_tt_id" ; $old_tt_id )
If old_tt_id is empty - it means that we duplicate the list inside the title. In that case - suffix is used for renaming
If the whole Title is cloned we need to point to new Blocks, Modifiers, Lists, Links, Score Categories, IOs, Tags etc
Suffix is only needed when duplicating inside a Title
old_list_id is the List id that we will clone
old_tt_id can be empty - when duplicated inside a Title.
new_tt_id gets the current Title id if not explicitly set
Find old_list_id in FAT List

Calculation.Text: TruncateText ( Case ( Not IsEmpty($suffix); FAT List::Name & " " & $suffix ; FAT List::Name) ; 29 ) // with "..." = 32 characters

Comment.value: Connect to new Object group if any

Calculation.Text: $isClonedTitle And Not IsEmpty ( FAT List::Object Group)

Comment.value: If cloning a Package group - a new object group is created
Duplicate Lists - preparing for Page items, IOs and Tags to link via Old PrimaryKey from clone
Set a valid object name - no duplicates allowed in same title, not exceeding number of characters

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT List::Name ) ) & SetProperty ( "new_name" ; $new_name ) & SetProperty ( "max_characters" ; 32 )

Comment.value: Duplicate modifiers

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "old_item_id" ; $old_list_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_item_id" ; $new_list_id ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "old_tt_id" ; $old_tt_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id )

Comment.value: Duplicate list items
List item loop
Save the current found set - used to recreate later

Calculation.Text: FAT List item::List of List items

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $new_li_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "list-item" ) & SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT List item::Text 1 id ) ) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName ))

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $new_li_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "list-item" ) & SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT List item::Text 2 id ) ) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName ))

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $new_li_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "list-item" ) & SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT List item::Text 3 id ) ) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName ))

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $new_li_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "list-item" ) & SetProperty ( "source_mediafield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT List item::Media 1 id ) ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName )) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id)

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $new_li_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "list-item" ) & SetProperty ( "source_mediafield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT List item::Media 2 id ) ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName )) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id)

Comment.value: A Tag filter list cannot have tags on list items + it corrupts the script sequence when cloning

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_item_id" ; $old_li_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_item_id" ; $new_li_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id )

Comment.value: Recreate score values

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix ) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_tt_id" ; $old_tt_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_item_id" ; $old_li_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_item_id" ; $new_li_id )

Comment.value: Make sure to recreate the found set and go to right record
List item values of type Link, Package id, Chapter id or Page id will be replaced as the last step in the clone process.

Calculation.Text: List template::Value 1 type = "IO" And Not IsEmpty (FAT List item::Value 1) And (PatternCount ( $clone_settings ; "IO" ) Or $isClonedTitle)

Comment.value: Value type IO - clone check
Using a unique TO since this script also can be called from Clone IO
Search for IO in oldPrimary if it is created earlier in clone process

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_tt_id" ; $old_tt_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "old_io_id" ; $old_io_id)

Comment.value: Make sure to recreate the found set and go to right record
---- End List item Loop

Calculation.Text: $isClonedTitle And Not IsEmpty (FAT List::List of Lists)

Comment.value: Point to the new List Group created earlier in Make an empty copy
Managing Dynamic Lists

Calculation.Text: $isClonedTitle And Not IsEmpty (FAT List::Dynamic List IO id)
FAT List::Dynamic List Text 1 Field id
FAT List::Dynamic List Text 2 Field id
FAT List::Dynamic List Text 3 Field id

Comment.value: Find the new Dynamic List IO created earlier (hopefully!)
Find the new Dynamic List Fields created earlier (hopefully!)
Field 1
Field 2
Field 3
Point to the new ids
Not managing Filter and Sort yet
